parameters.query:
INSERT INTO conversations (session_id, messages, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{$node["Webhook"].json.body.sessionId}}',
  '{{$json.messages.toJsonString()}}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (session_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  messages = '{{$json.messages.toJsonString()}}'::jsonb,
  updated_at = NOW();
